prompt: Create a full-body vertical character concept illustration of an elegant futuristic Chinese gacha-game style celestial nun or angel named Luna, standing front-facing in a perfectly centered symmetrical pose on a pale reflective floor. She has extremely long flowing silvery white with faint lavender-blue highlights hair cascading past her knees, a luminous thin halo above her head, and a soft blank pale-lavender square obscuring the face area instead of visible facial features. Her outfit is a layered white ceremonial dress with translucent veils, sheer cape panels, crystalline fabric, a fitted bodice, long detached sleeves, high collar with black inner chest panel, silver cross-like ornaments, thin dark belt, tiny red accent ribbons, and white high-heeled boots. The dress and veil should contain delicate glowing constellation-line patterns, star sparkles, prismatic refractions, and pale violet-blue magical light, with fabric edges drawn as transparent glassy polygons. Use a very bright ethereal palette of white, ice blue, pale lavender, silver, and tiny red accents. The background is a minimal sacred sci-fi temple interface: soft white walls, faint circular halo diagrams behind the head, thin vertical guide lines, tiny decorative symbols, and subtle Chinese-style side inscriptions reading 彼岸代光 on both left and right. Style: high-end anime mobile RPG character key art, intricate but airy linework, luminous fantasy fashion design, delicate gradients, glossy reflection under the feet, soft bloom lighting, clean composition, no extra characters, no weapons, no logo, no watermark.
